title: What Testing a Lunar Antenna in Thermal Vacuum Taught Me About Margin
excerpt: The Moon's South Pole doesn't forgive optimistic link budgets. Notes on qualifying a high-gain antenna for the harshest RF environment there is.

title: CBRS Private 5G: Lessons from 300+ Site Deployments
excerpt: What actually breaks when you take private cellular from PowerPoint to production — vendor selection, SAS surprises, and the RF details everyone skips.

title: From Drive Tests to the Moon: A Career Across the Spectrum
excerpt: Fiber optics → GSM → 5G → eVTOL → lunar comms. What each band taught me, and advice for engineers who want to move between RF worlds.
